name: probable-disco
description: Portable C++ voxel forest engine targeting WebAssembly and Nintendo Switch homebrew.
author: AndyPants

scripts.build:web: cmake -E rm -rf dist && emcmake cmake -S . -B build/web -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build build/web && cmake -E echo "Web build output:" && find dist -maxdepth 3 -type f
